channel.title: Graphic novels met tie-ins media on Flash deals to get monitored

item.title: David & Charles - PokeMon Crochet Vol 2: Bring Even More PokeMon to Life with 20 Cute Crochet Patterns
item.description: You can find David & Charles - PokeMon Crochet Vol 2: Bring Even More PokeMon to Life with 20 Cute Crochet Patterns with a discount here: ℹ️: 🛒 Buy it!!
